sourceText: With unwavering resolve and exceptional military command, she suppressed rebellions, fought against Rome, expanded the Palmyrene Empire, and rose as a powerful force in the East.
I am no mere queen ruling a subject of Rome, but the mother of Rome itself.
This expresses a strong will to forge one's own destiny and refuse to yield to circumstances.
The wise do not lose courage even in the face of death.
This emphasizes that maintaining composure and courage amidst any hardship is a wise attitude.
The spirit of Palmyra is stronger than the legions of Rome.
This highlights the importance of national pride and united will that transcends physical strength.

He had to contend with the prevailing scientific dogma of species fixity, presenting evidence for extinction, and undertook the immense task of collecting and meticulously organizing vast quantities of anatomical specimens.

Through rigorous study of fossil records and detailed comparative anatomical analysis, he proved extinction and established the principle of 'correlation of forms,' revolutionizing animal classification.
Nature is always the most excellent teacher.
Emphasizes that direct observation and study of natural phenomena and the structures of living beings are the most reliable ways to gain profound knowledge.
Every part of an organism is intimately connected to its way of life.
Indicates the importance of understanding how an animal's anatomical features adapt and function within its environment and survival strategy.
